items.name: Lunella - The Bat Cinderella - Shoulder Pet Pal
items.description:
High above the Roblox skies, where the stars twinkle like diamonds, lives Lunella, the Bat Cinderella. Once an ordinary bat, she was enchanted by a moonbeam on a magical night, giving her shimmering wings and a heart full of dreams. Now, she soars through the night, spreading stardust and guiding lost travelers back home.

With every flap of her glowing wings, Lunella proves that even the smallest creatures can shine the brightest. 🌙✨

Color: blue / white
Position: right shoulder

Created by Dev_OnCake © 2025. Copyright protected. DMCA claims filed without warning upon infringement.

Tags:
plush, plushie, bat, toy, stuffed, plüsch ,plüschtier ,schwarz, UGC, pal, pet

items.name: PARADISE LOST SCAR STITCH LONG COAT
items.description:
A MID LENGTH HOODED COAT WITH A REFINED, BODY FOLLOWING SILHOUETTE AND SUBTLY STRUCTURED SHOULDERS. CONSTRUCTED THROUGH IRREGULAR PANELING AND EXPOSED STITCH MAPPING THAT TRACES THE TORSO AND ARMS, CREATING A RAW, REASSEMBLED SURFACE. CLEAN SLEEVE LINE, FULL LENGTH CENTER ZIP CLOSURE, AND A SLIGHTLY TAPERED FALL WITH CONTROLLED VOLUME.

FW25: SACRIFICE
items.searchText:
paradise lost scar stitch long coat a mid length hooded coat with a refined, body following silhouette and subtly structured shoulders. constructed through irregular paneling and exposed stitch mapping that traces the torso and arms, creating a raw, reassembled surface. clean sleeve line, full length center zip closure, and a slightly tapered fall with controlled volume.

items.name: White Pearl Dewy Glossy Eye Shadow Eye Lid
items.description: White Pearl Dewy Glossy Eye Shadow Eye Lid delivers a luminous, glass-like shine with a soft pearlescent glow. Featuring a white pearl tone with a dewy, glossy finish, this eyeshadow creates a fresh, radiant look that feels clean, modern, and effortlessly elegant.
